name: transcriptAnalyze
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.speakingRate === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.fillerRate === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.vocabularyRichness === 'string'

data.transcript: Good morning. Um, we will ship the great release today.

_note: LENS_ACTION (registerLensAction). Dispatch key 'voice.transcriptAnalyze'. Deterministic pure text compute; reads artifact.data (VoiceActionPanel.callMacro channel: runDomain → {input:{artifact:{data}}} peeled at dispatch). FAIL-CLOSED: a non-finite or negative durationMinutes (NaN/Infinity/'1e999') is rejected via Number.isFinite (no NaN WPM leak); a non-string transcript is rejected. Result card renders wordCount/sentenceCount/speakingRate('N words/min')/fillerWords{} (object)/totalFillers/fillerRate('N%')/vocabularyRichness EXACTLY — the page's prior inline panel read wpm/sentences/durationSeconds + fillerWords-as-number which were never returned (fixed 2026-06-28). Not assassin-driven (LENS_ACTION, not in MACROS map); authored spec pinned by server/tests/voice-lens-macros.test.js.
